concept: In Papa's Paleteria To Go!, players manage a paleteria, taking customer orders, then preparing custom ice pops through a series of mini-games involving selecting flavors, adding mixables, dipping, and topping. Gameplay is divided into distinct stations (Order, Build, Dip, Top), navigated via on-screen tabs, where players use drag-and-drop, tapping, and swiping gestures to precisely fulfill orders against a customer patience timer.
name: Papa's Paleteria To Go!
